tasks.label: DPF: Production Build
args: pnpm --filter @dpf/db exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter web build

tasks.label: DPF: Shared Workspace Infrastructure
args: docker compose up -d postgres neo4j qdrant portal-init sandbox
tasks.detail: Start databases + validation services for shared-workspace development

tasks.label: DPF: Start Production Runtime
tasks.detail: Start full Docker stack including portal

tasks.label: DPF: Restart Production Runtime
args: docker compose down && docker compose up -d

tasks.label: DPF: Rebuild Production Runtime
args: docker compose build --no-cache portal portal-init sandbox && docker compose up -d portal-init sandbox && docker compose up -d portal
tasks.detail: Rebuild portal + sandbox images from source and restart (includes migrations)

tasks.label: DPF: Rebuild All
args: docker compose build && docker compose up -d
tasks.detail: Rebuild all images and restart full stack

tasks.label: DPF: Release Minor
tasks.detail: Pull latest main, bump minor version (v0.85.0 -> v0.86.0), tag and push

tasks.label: DPF: Release Patch
tasks.detail: Pull latest main, bump patch version (v0.85.0 -> v0.85.1), tag and push

tasks.label: DPF: Release Major
tasks.detail: Pull latest main, bump major version (v0.85.0 -> v1.0.0), tag and push

tasks.label: DPF: Clean Reinstall from Git (WIPES ALL DATA)
tasks.detail: DESTRUCTIVE: Checks for uncommitted changes, closes VS Code, wipes ALL Docker volumes/images/data, and deletes the project directory. Follow the README to reinstall fresh.

tasks.label: DPF: Factory Reset (WIPES ALL DATA)
args: echo WARNING: This will destroy ALL data including the database, users, OAuth tokens, sandbox workspace, and all configuration. Press Ctrl+C to cancel, or && pause && docker compose down -v --remove-orphans && docker compose build && docker compose up -d
tasks.detail: DESTRUCTIVE: Stops all containers, deletes ALL volumes (database, sandbox, neo4j, qdrant, redis), rebuilds all images from source, and starts fresh. You will need to reconfigure everything: admin user, OAuth providers, branding, etc.
